query:
ALTER TABLE offerings 
ADD COLUMN offeringType ENUM('regulation_d_506c', 'regulation_d_506b', 'regulation_a_plus', 'regulation_cf') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'regulation_d_506c',
ADD COLUMN regulationType VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN totalOfferingAmount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN minimumOfferingAmount INT,
ADD COLUMN maximumOfferingAmount INT,
ADD COLUMN totalShares INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN availableShares INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN pricePerShare INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN minimumShares INT,
ADD COLUMN maximumShares INT,
ADD COLUMN ownershipStructure ENUM('llc_membership', 'reit_shares', 'corporation_stock', 'limited_partnership', 'other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'llc_membership',
ADD COLUMN votingRights TEXT,
ADD COLUMN distributionRights TEXT,
ADD COLUMN holdingPeriodMonths INT,
ADD COLUMN exitStrategy ENUM('property_sale', 'refinance', 'buyout', 'ipo', 'other'),
ADD COLUMN exitStrategyDetails TEXT,
ADD COLUMN fundingStartDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN fundingEndDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN expectedClosingDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN expectedExitDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN projectedIRR INT,
ADD COLUMN projectedROI INT,
ADD COLUMN cashOnCashReturn INT,
ADD COLUMN equityMultiple INT,
ADD COLUMN annualDistribution INT,
ADD COLUMN distributionFrequency ENUM('monthly', 'quarterly', 'semi_annually', 'annually'),
ADD COLUMN updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
